name: a profile that configures only unrelated rules leaves the target rule enforced at its native severity (still blocks)
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  some-unrelated-rule: warn
' > prof.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile prof.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && grep -q 'disabled=0' e.txt && echo omitted-rule-still-enforced 1>&2
